title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2026, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2026 Hot Wheels.

title: 2026 Treasure Hunts Series
summary: This is a list of Treasure Hunts from 2026.

title: Corvette
summary: Corvette is an automobile produced by the Chevrolet division of General Motors. It is one of America's most storied sports cars, having a history dating back to 1953. Hot Wheels has made many different Corvette models.

title: Hot Wheels XL
summary: 200px|rightHot Wheels XL is a 1:43 scale series of Hot Wheels; in essence the castings in this series are scaled up versions of mainline castings, carrying over their decos and often their wheels. This series was developed by Charlie Angulo.

title: David Hasselhoff
summary: David Hasselhoff is an American celebrity, singer, and actor most known for roles in Knight Rider, Baywatch, Guardians of the Galaxy and many others. Hot Wheels has collaborated with him on for numerous releases and advertising bearing his name and likeness.

title: Japanese Car Culture Themed Multipack (2026)
summary: First, how can you question it when you don't have it in hand to see? Second, each silver series has had at least one with a metal base. Third, each '98 Toyota Altezza has had a metal base so far. Fourth, research first before editing. Go to eBay, there is at least one with a great pic of the base and you can see.
